codeReview.summary: The feature successfully updates both index.html and final-study-platform.html with 6 new categories (js-classes, js-dom, js-events, html-forms, css-responsive, web-apis) and corresponding lecture modules. All verification requirements are met: categories array includes all 14 categories, module arrays include all new modules, category count displays show 14, quiz category selection includes all new categories, and lecture navigation includes all new modules.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The architecture.md in .factory/library/ already correctly documents the 14 categories in mega-question-bank.js. This confirms consistency between the question bank and platform UI after this feature update.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md:9 - categories list matches what was added to index.html and final-study-platform.html

summary: Feature 'update-platform-ui' passes review. Both index.html and final-study-platform.html were updated with 6 new categories (js-classes, js-dom, js-events, html-forms, css-responsive, web-apis) and 6 new lecture modules. Category arrays updated from 8 to 14 in updateOverallProgress(), generateCheatSheet(), renderModuleNav(), showCategorySelector(), and renderProgressDashboard() functions. Category count displays show 14 (not 8). Quiz category selection includes all new categories. Module navigation includes all new modules with icons. Cheat sheet entries added for all 6 new categories. No blocking issues found.
